name: dashboard-shell
title: Dashboard Shell
description: App frame for clinical dashboards: an optional fixed sidebar, a sticky header, and a centered scrolling content region. Compose a DashboardGrid inside.

props.name: sidebar
props.description: Left nav column. Static when the shell is wide; a toggled drawer (with a header hamburger) when narrow.

props.name: header
props.description: Sticky top bar — patient banner, search, user menu.

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Enable the narrow-width drawer + header toggle.

clinicalNotes: Sized by CONTAINER queries, not the viewport, so the shell adapts to the width it's embedded in — a split pane, a modal, or the docs preview — not just the browser size. When the container is wide the sidebar is static; when narrow it collapses to a toggled drawer with a hamburger in the header, so navigation is never lost on a bedside tablet. The header is sticky so the patient banner (name, MRN, allergies) stays on screen while a clinician scrolls a long chart — a core patient-safety pattern. Client component (drawer state); bring your own routing/active state.
notes: Layer-M0 scaffolding. Client component. The container-query outer frame of every M3 block.
